segments.text: If one’s offering is a peace offering and he offers an animal from the herd, whether male or female, he must present it without blemish before the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He is to lay his hand on the head of the offering and slaughter it at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting. Then Aaron’s sons the priests shall sprinkle the blood on all sides of the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From the peace offering he is to bring an offering made by fire to the LORD: the fat that covers the entrails, all the fat that is on them,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both kidneys with the fat on them near the loins, and the lobe of the liver, which he is to remove with the kidneys.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then Aaron’s sons are to burn it on the altar atop the burnt offering that is on the burning wood, as an offering made by fire, a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If, however, one’s peace offering to the LORD is from the flock, he must present a male or female without blemish.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If he is presenting a lamb for his offering, he must present it before the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He is to lay his hand on the head of his offering and slaughter it in front of the Tent of Meeting. Then Aaron’s sons shall sprinkle its blood on all sides of the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And from the peace offering he shall bring an offering made by fire to the LORD consisting of its fat: the entire fat tail cut off close to the backbone, the fat that covers the entrails, all the fat that is on them,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both kidneys with the fat on them near the loins, and the lobe of the liver, which he is to remove with the kidneys.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then the priest is to burn them on the altar as food, an offering made by fire to the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: If one’s offering is a goat, he is to present it before the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: He must lay his hand on its head and slaughter it in front of the Tent of Meeting. Then Aaron’s sons shall sprinkle its blood on all sides of the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And from his offering he shall present an offering made by fire to the LORD: the fat that covers the entrails, all the fat that is on them,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: both kidneys with the fat on them near the loins, and the lobe of the liver, which he is to remove with the kidneys.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then the priest is to burn the food on the altar as an offering made by fire, a pleasing aroma. All the fat is the LORD’s.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This is a permanent statute for the generations to come, wherever you live: You must not eat any fat or any blood.
segments.speaker: The LORD
